p{} element selecter
.__ {} class selector
#__ {} id selector
(element) , (element){} group selector 

In this file i use `` to refer an element 

`font family`
use google fonts to get fonts 

1px = 1/96 of inch 

there are three ways to write color on css 
1. color by name -->  red
2. color by rgb value --> rgb(0,0,0)  (btw black)
3. color by hex value --> #ffffff (btw white)

padding/maergin : 10px 20px 30px 40px  -->(top right bottom laft)
padding/maergin : 10px 20px -->(x,y)
box-sizing: border box;
